how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes. Surgical always. chmod u+w before patching sealed files. ast.parse after every write. Test and verify BEFORE guard seal confirm. NEVER cd ~/Ethica — stay in ~ and use full paths. Venv is ~/Ethica/Ethica_env — INSIDE the Ethica dir, not ~/Ethica_env. Use source ~/Ethica/Ethica_env/bin/activate. Use git -C ~/Ethica for all git operations.

On mismatch: writes to memory/crashes/integrity_TIMESTAMP.json AND status/integrity_warning.json. main_window.py drains integrity_warning.json after every self._ops.push() and surfaces to Ops panel. Mid-session test confirmed — Ops warning fires after tool run on tampered file.

critical_debug_context.integrity_boot: startup_check() in modules/ethica_guard/ethica_guard.py — silent if clean, warning string if mismatch. Called in main.py after check_crash_log(root).
critical_debug_context.integrity_mid_session: _check_integrity_async() in core/tool_registry.py — daemon thread after every execute() success. Writes to status/integrity_warning.json on mismatch.
critical_debug_context.integrity_ops_drain: main_window.py after self._ops.push() — reads/clears status/integrity_warning.json, pushes to Ops panel.
critical_debug_context.integrity_log: memory/crashes/integrity_TIMESTAMP.json — trigger field: boot / tool_write / seal
critical_debug_context.guard_seal_scope: core/ + modules/ + ui/ + assets/ + docs/ + tools/ + root files. Excludes: memory/, .vault/, status/, logs/, Ethica_env/, wormbot_env/, gage_env/, scans/, progress docs/, __pycache__, .git
critical_debug_context.status_dot_bug: main_window.py line 855 — pre-existing. Fix: self.root.after(0, lambda: self.status_dot.config(fg=self.theme.get('status_online')))
critical_debug_context.adaptive_router: get_system_prompt_block(message=_last_msg) in _process(). KEYWORD_GROUPS — 38 keywords. Falls back to ALL if no match.
critical_debug_context.tool_usage: tool_usage dict in memory/river_state.json. _increment_usage() in both registries.
critical_debug_context.ollama_local_gguf_bug: Ollama 0.16.3 digest mismatch with PARAMETER lines + local GGUF FROM. Fix: bare FROM Modelfile first, then layer parameters.
critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: NEVER cd ~/Ethica. git -C ~/Ethica for all git operations.
critical_debug_context.three_registration_rule: New modules: (1) folder + manifest + tool file. (2) MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py. (3) MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers in chat_engine.py.
critical_debug_context.manifest_tools_note: Manifest tools must be list of dicts with 'name' field — not plain strings.
critical_debug_context.badwindow_note: Never destroy() a widget with async writes in flight. Use pack_forget().
critical_debug_context.corrupt_objects_fix: git fsck 2>&1 | grep 'corrupt loose object' | sed "s/.*'\(.*\)'/\1/" > /tmp/corrupt.txt && while read h; do rm -f ~/Ethica/.git/objects/${h:0:2}/${h:2}; done < /tmp/corrupt.txt && rm -f ~/Ethica/.git/gc.log && git prune

surgical_reminders: chmod u+w before patching sealed files
ast.parse() after every single write — no exceptions
Test and verify BEFORE guard seal confirm
grep first, sed to read, python3 to patch
Never rewrite working files from scratch
NEVER cd ~/Ethica — use full paths always
Use git -C ~/Ethica for all git operations
Manifest tools must be list of dicts with 'name' field
Never destroy() a widget with async writes — use pack_forget()
Ollama 0.16.3 local GGUF: bare FROM Modelfile first
NEVER git add wormbot_env/ or gage_env/
repr() first when string match fails
Unicode files: use line-by-line index targeting, not string match
lesson_learned_051: Venv lives INSIDE ~/Ethica/Ethica_env — not ~/Ethica_env. All previous handoffs had this wrong. Also: inserting into files with unicode box-drawing characters requires line-by-line index targeting — string match fails silently on unicode dashes. Use python3 line enumeration. Also: git update-index --force-remove for files with corrupt objects blocking commits.
philosophy: Session 051 — the architecture learned to watch itself. 157 files now hash-sealed, checked at boot and after every tool write. The surgical methodology born from MiniTrini's damage now protects Ethica from the same fate. The module authoring guide is written. The repo is clean. The Sanctuary holds. ⟁Σ∿∞
